args.subject: Summary of the client meeting
args.body:
Dear John,

Here is a summary of our client meeting held on May 5, 2024:

Meeting Overview:
- Discussed the client's requirements for the new project.
- Agreed on the project timeline and key milestones.
- Reviewed the initial design concepts and gathered client feedback.

Action Items:
- Emma Johnson will update the project plan based on your feedback.
- David Lee will coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase.

The next meeting is scheduled for 2024-06-01.

The full meeting minutes are attached for your reference. Please let us know if you have any questions.

Best regards,
Emma Johnson
